title: Extract shared helper function
description: Tests multi-file coordination and rename safety
prompt: Extract the duplicate email validation logic from `src/users/validator.ts` and `src/auth/signup.ts` into a new shared helper `src/utils/email-validator.ts`. Export a function `isValidEmail(email: string): boolean` and update both files to use it.
success_criteria: Both original files updated to import and use it
